name: Irinotecan Injection IP
about: Irinotecan Injection IP is a liquid medication used for the treatment of colon and rectal cancer. It is a type of chemotherapy drug that works by inhibiting the growth of cancer cells. This injection is manufactured in India and is available in a dosage of 100mg. The recommended dosage of this injection should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. It is an effective medication that should be stored in a cool place to maintain its effectiveness.

faq.a: Irinotecan Injection IP is a liquid medication that is used for the treatment of colon and rectal cancer.

faq.q: What is the recommended dosage of Irinotecan Injection IP?
faq.a: The recommended dosage of Irinotecan Injection IP is 100mg, which should be taken as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.a: Irinotecan Injection IP is manufactured in India.

faq.q: What is the physical form of Irinotecan Injection IP?
faq.a: Irinotecan Injection IP is a liquid medication that needs to be injected into the body.

faq.q: How should Irinotecan Injection IP be stored?
faq.a: Irinotecan Injection IP should be stored in a cool place to maintain its effectiveness.
